query_text: EIA Short-Term Energy Outlook petroleum inventories supply demand
notes: EIA STEO and related data are suitable for official US energy production consumption price and inventory baselines; https://www.eia.gov/outlooks/steo/

query_text: IEA Oil Market Report supply demand stocks
notes: IEA Oil Market Report is a global oil supply demand and stock reference; https://www.iea.org/reports/oil-market-report-may-2026

query_text: OPEC Monthly Oil Market Report supply demand inventories
notes: OPEC MOMR is useful for producer-group supply demand framing but must be compared with IEA/EIA and market data; https://www.opec.org/opec_web/en/publications/338.htm

query_text: USDA WASDE world agricultural supply and demand estimates
notes: USDA WASDE provides official agricultural supply demand and stock estimates; https://www.usda.gov/oce/commodity/wasde

query_text: London Metal Exchange warehouse stocks market data
notes: LME market data and warehouse stock reports are useful visible inventory inputs for base metals; https://www.lme.com/en/Market-data

query_text: CFTC Commitments of Traders explanatory notes futures options
notes: CFTC COT reports can support positioning analysis but not physical supply-demand conclusions; https://www.cftc.gov/MarketReports/CommitmentsofTraders/index.htm

query_text: CME Group contango backwardation futures curve commodity education
notes: CME education material is useful for futures curve terminology and roll-yield mechanics, not as commodity-specific evidence; https://www.cmegroup.com/education/courses/introduction-to-futures.html

query_text: World Bank Commodity Markets Outlook methodology commodity prices
notes: World Bank CMO is useful for broad commodity price context and cross-commodity framing; https://www.worldbank.org/en/research/commodity-markets
